title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. remotifrons
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. remotifrons, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is primarily found in mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds and reducing swelling. Herbal preparations of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. remotifrons can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its health benefits and proper uses.
